alerts.message: Calendar-aware arithmetic unavailable (no cal_map/clndr_id) - falling back to 7-day ordinal arithmetic.

SUB_DAY_LAG_ROUNDED: lag/duration value 0.5 is fractional; engine rounds to 1 day(s). V8 Math.round rounds half toward +Infinity; sub-day lags inflate, sub-day leads truncate to zero — sub-day precision is forensically unavailable in this engine. P6 typically stores lags in hours; re-run with full-day lags or accept the documented drift.
